series.title: Der Grüffelo
series.curator_notes: Based on the classic picture book by Julia Donaldson/Axel Scheffler. This is the film tie-in Hörspiel (not a traditional episodic series). The album contains a single story split into 6 parts plus intro/outro. Spin-off/sequel 'Das Grüffelokind' is a separate artist on Spotify and not included here per curation guidelines.

review.notes: Auto-approved: no gaps or duplicates found.

verification.concerns: Only one album included - "Der Grüffelo" has many more audiobooks/audio plays beyond just the original film soundtrack. Could there be more albums in the series? I should verify this is not missing entries. However, the first reviewer's auto-approval suggests no gaps were found. Given this is the original film audio play and appears correctly included, I'll approve but note a minor observation.
